overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage showing a player exploring a dark rural village at night. The player moves through grassy areas and narrow paths between wooden log cabins, drawing a wooden club weapon while navigating the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy churchyard with wooden grave crosses

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward wooden log cabins in the dark, surveying the surroundings

entered.detail: large wooden log cabin with steep thatched roof and horizontal timber construction
wooden plank fence surrounding the village perimeter
wooden grave marker cross standing in the grass
tall green grass covering the ground surface

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open grassy churchyard at night toward a wooden log cabin. The area is dimly lit with wooden grave crosses visible in the grass, and a wooden fence marking the village boundary ahead.

events.description: player character raises wooden club into view, gripping it in right hand

agents.ego_description: holding a wooden club weapon and continuing toward the village entrance gate

entered.detail: wooden club held in player's hand, showing wrapped grip and worn wood texture
opening in the wooden fence leading into the village interior

segments.scene_description: The player draws a wooden club while approaching the village gate. Moving closer to the main log cabin which now dominates the left side of the frame, with the fence line shifting to the right as the entrance nears.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village path between log cabins

events.description: passing through wooden gate into the enclosed village interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the village gate into a narrow passage between wooden buildings, club still raised

entered.detail: smaller log cabin structure on the right side of the village path
wooden tripod structure standing in the village center area
packed dirt ground surface replacing the grass

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate into a narrow village street between log cabins. The ground changes from grass to dirt, and a wooden tripod structure becomes visible in the village center ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley alongside log cabin with laundry line

events.description: turning left to follow the wall of the main log cabin

agents.ego_description: moving along the side wall of the log cabin, passing windows and a clothesline with hanging laundry

entered.detail: wooden window with shutters on the log cabin wall
rope clothesline with white fabric hanging to dry

segments.scene_description: Moving along the exterior wall of the main log cabin, passing wooden windows and a clothesline with hanging laundry. The path is narrow and enclosed, with the building wall filling the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, eerie churchyard into the claustrophobic confines of a rural village street at night. It begins by gliding through dim grass dotted with wooden grave crosses toward a distant boundary fence. As the camera approaches the village gate, the player draws a wooden club, and the perspective shifts to bring a large log cabin into dominant view on the left. The scene then transitions through the gate, where the grassy terrain gives way to a narrow dirt path leading toward a wooden tripod structure in the village center. Finally, the movement tightens as the camera brushes along the exterior wall of the main cabin, passing wooden windows and hanging laundry on a clothesline.
